creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
Thomas E. Zander schrieb:,

> >Description:
> mplayer causes segfaults caused by using decoding routines which do not apply 
> to the used CPU.
> >How-To-Repeat:
> Building mplayer with support for instruction sets which do not match the impl
> emented set, e.g. use of 3Dnow on an Intel machine.
> >Fix:
> This port update contains a new makefile, so everybody can define the options 
> for the used decoding instruction set.
> 
> # This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before

Please send an unified diff.

kind regards Dirk

- Dirk Meyer, Im Grund 4, 34317 Habichtswald, Germany
